title: Senior Frontend Developer at Milkbasket Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at Milkbasket Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Milkbasket Ventures Solutions. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Frontend Developer to strengthen our Amritsar-based team.

About Milkbasket Ventures Solutions:
Milkbasket Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Milkbasket Ventures Solutions!
